profile_caveat: Run completed profiler traces for steps 1 and 2, then failed while starting another profiler cycle at step 3 with HSA_STATUS_ERROR_OUT_OF_RESOURCES. Treat iteration_2 as usable profile evidence, not as a clean 3-step canary result.
failure: rank6 SIGABRT during step3 recompute/forward after profiler restart; log reports HSA_STATUS_ERROR_OUT_OF_RESOURCES and Available Free mem: 0 MB.

notes: Durations are Chrome trace X-event dur values converted from microseconds to milliseconds.
summary_exact_cpu_mori and dense_linear_backward_user_annotation use cat=user_annotation inclusive ranges; parent and child ranges are intentionally not summed together.
top_cpu_mm_related captures raw PyTorch/autograd GEMM-family CPU ranges and is useful for spotting unattributed MmBackward0 residue.
read: The identical-dispatch-order shortcut removes the repeated top-k receive-count sync and source-position alignment tax in MORI routed backward. In the profiler trace, routed VJP drops from 7.94s/rank to 4.52s/rank; remaining cost is local padded VJP, dominated by SwiGLU forward/backward recompute ranges. Dense attention/indexer/router linear backward child ranges are small versus MORI; raw MmBackward0 is about 39ms/rank in this trace. The profile aborts only when a third profiler cycle starts, so use the iteration_2 range split but validate throughput with a separate non-profiled run.
